name: Firebase Auth
description: Firebase Authentication REST API for managing user identity. Sign up and sign in users with email/password, OAuth providers, custom tokens, or anonymously. Send password reset and email verification messages, exchange refresh tokens, manage user profiles, and delete accounts.

capabilities.name: sign_up_email
capabilities.description: Create a new user account with email and password.

capabilities.name: sign_in_email
capabilities.description: Sign in with email and password, returning ID and refresh tokens.

capabilities.name: sign_in_oauth
capabilities.description: Sign in with an OAuth credential from Google, Facebook, or other providers.

capabilities.name: sign_in_custom_token
capabilities.description: Sign in using a custom token generated by the Firebase Admin SDK.

capabilities.name: link_email_password
capabilities.description: Link an email/password credential to an existing user account.

capabilities.name: send_password_reset
capabilities.description: Send a password reset email to a specified address.

capabilities.name: confirm_password_reset
capabilities.description: Confirm a password reset using the OOB code from email.

capabilities.name: send_email_verification
capabilities.description: Send an email verification message to the authenticated user.

capabilities.name: confirm_email_verification
capabilities.description: Confirm email verification using the OOB code.

capabilities.name: get_user_data
capabilities.description: Retrieve profile information for the authenticated user.

capabilities.name: update_profile
capabilities.description: Update user profile attributes like display name, photo, email, and password.

capabilities.name: delete_account
capabilities.description: Permanently delete the authenticated user's account.

capabilities.name: exchange_refresh_token
capabilities.description: Exchange a refresh token for a new ID token to maintain sessions.
